name: Turkey Tortilla Stew
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz Dark red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over medium heat in a skillet.
2. Add turkey, onions, bell peppers, and garlic to the skillet.
3. Cook until the turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in water, crushed tomatoes, pinto beans, kidney beans, tomato soup, corn kernels, and black pepper.
5. Heat mixture until it is bubbly.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
